---
name: Security
about: Track private-safe security hardening work without exposing exploit details
title: "[Security] "
labels: ["type: security", "status: triage", "priority: high"]
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the security work without publishing exploit details.

## Area

- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Authorization
- [ ] Tenant isolation
- [ ] Database/RLS
- [ ] Secrets
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] Audit/logging
- [ ] Other

## Risk

Describe impact, likelihood, and affected surfaces.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Risk is mitigated or explicitly accepted.
- [ ] Tests or validation steps are included.
- [ ] Secrets are not exposed in code, logs, issues, or PRs.
- [ ] Relevant documentation is updated.

## Private Details

Do not include sensitive exploit details in public issues. Use the process in `SECURITY.md` when needed.
